name: wechat-formatter
description: WeChat article formatter with 6 professional styles (tech-blog, tutorial, deep-dive, casual-chat, apple, cyber). Auto-analyzes article and formats to WeChat-ready Markdown/HTML.

interface.shortDescription: WeChat article formatter with 6 professional styles
interface.longDescription: Use this skill to format articles for WeChat public accounts. Supports 6 styles: tech-blog, tutorial, deep-dive, casual-chat, apple, cyber. Auto-analyzes content and outputs WeChat-ready Markdown/HTML.
